mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'SUCCESS') AS success_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'FAILED') AS failure_count, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (completed_at - created_at)) * 1000) FILTER (WHERE completed_at IS NOT NULL) AS average_latency_ms FROM ai_api_calls WHERE created_at >= #{from} AND created_at < #{until}

SELECT COALESCE(error_code, 'UNKNOWN') AS error_code, COUNT(*) AS count FROM ai_api_calls WHERE created_at >= #{from} AND created_at < #{until} AND status = 'FAILED' GROUP BY COALESCE(error_code, 'UNKNOWN') ORDER BY count DESC, error_code

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status IN ('READY', 'PUBLISHED', 'FAILED')) AS completed_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED') AS published_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'FAILED') AS failed_count, COALESCE(SUM(GREATEST(attempt_count - 1, 0)), 0) AS retry_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE error_message ILIKE '%DIVERSITY%' OR error_message ILIKE '%duplicate%') AS duplicate_rejected_count, AVG(validation_score) FILTER (WHERE validation_score IS NOT NULL) AS average_validation_score FROM generation_logs WHERE created_at >= #{from}

SELECT days.challenge_date, COUNT(qs.id) FILTER (WHERE qs.status = 'PUBLISHED') AS published_count, #{requiredCount} AS required_count FROM generate_series(#{from}::DATE, #{until}::DATE, INTERVAL '1 day') AS days(challenge_date) LEFT JOIN quiz_sets qs ON qs.challenge_date = days.challenge_date::DATE WHERE EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM days.challenge_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 5 GROUP BY days.challenge_date ORDER BY days.challenge_date
SELECT id AS generation_log_id, target_date, status, error_message, updated_at FROM generation_logs WHERE status = 'FAILED' ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT aal.id AS audit_log_id, au.login_name AS actor_login_name, aal.action, aal.target_type, aal.target_id, aal.created_at FROM admin_audit_logs aal LEFT JOIN app_users au ON au.id = aal.actor_user_id ORDER BY aal.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT id AS operation_event_id, event_type, status, message, started_at, completed_at FROM operation_events WHERE event_type = #{eventType} ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM source_briefs WHERE status = 'READY'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content_sources WHERE verified = TRUE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_events (event_type, status, message) VALUES (#{eventType}, #{status}, #{message})
